prompt:
Subject:
A profile draped in blue

Main Subject:
A single adult woman standing at a sunny seaside. A vertical 2:3 fashion portrait with the person positioned slightly left of center, capturing them from the chest to the top of the head. Wearing a vibrant blue outer garment dropped low from both shoulders, creating an impressive contrast between the white V-neck garment and the blue sea.

Person & Expression:
A natural Japanese woman with a calm, adult atmosphere. A dark brown blunt bob, almost black, showing a clean neckline. The sea breeze lightly blows the bangs and hair ends to the right. The head is tilted slightly forward, with the face in a diagonal profile facing right. Gaze is cast diagonally downward, with a quiet and relaxed expression and lips slightly parted. Transparent light beige skin, coral-tone lips, delicate eyeliner, and natural eyelashes.

Clothing & Pose:
An ivory white V-neck dress with thin shoulder straps. The neckline is deep but elegant, with a soft ribbed lightweight fabric naturally following the curves of a mature body. A vibrant cobalt blue light jacket is lowered to above the elbows, broadly revealing both shoulders and collarbones. Shoulders are relaxed, with the upper body slightly twisted to the left. Delicate drop earrings with small transparent stones at the end of thin gold chains. A dainty necklace with a single small stone.

Background & Light:
The background is a deep blue sea stretching to the horizon and a clear sky. A blurred small island silhouette in the far left and a white seaside railing at the bottom. Strong natural light from around noon shines from the top left, creating bright highlights on the hair surface, left shoulder, collarbone, and cheek. Soft blue reflected light on the right side of the face, with natural thin shadows under the nose and chin. Fine reflections of light sparkle on the sea surface, clearly separating the blue of the sky and the sea.

Composition & Camera:
Vertical 2:3, medium close-up focused on the bust. The person occupies about 75% of the screen, leaving a small amount of sky above and space for the sea on the right. Camera is at an eye-level slightly higher than the chest. 85mm equivalent medium telephoto lens, shallow depth of field precisely focused on the eyes and profile, smoothly blurring the background sea and island.

Texture & Style:
High-quality summer fashion photography. Natural skin leaving slight texture and fine hairs, no excessive skin retouching. Precise depiction of fine weaves of white cloth, light wrinkles in the blue jacket, and small reflections from metal accessories. A high-saturation yet clean color tone focused on blue and white, fresh contrast, and delicate film grain.

promptZh:
主体：
身披蓝色的侧影

主要拍摄对象：
一位站在阳光明媚海边的成年女性。采用 2:3 纵向构图的时尚人像，人物位于画面中心偏左，取景范围从胸部到头顶。身穿一件从双肩滑落的亮蓝色外套，与 白色 V 领服装 和蓝色大海形成鲜明对比。

人物与表情：
一位气质沉稳、成熟的日本女性。深棕色（近乎黑色）的齐肩短发，露出干净的颈部线条。海风轻拂，刘海和发梢微微向右飘动。头部略微前倾，面部呈斜侧面朝向右方。目光斜视下方，表情安静放松，双唇微启。透亮的浅米色皮肤，珊瑚色唇妆，精致的眼线和自然的睫毛。

服装与姿态：
一件象牙白色的细肩带 V 领连衣裙。领口深邃而不失优雅，柔软的罗纹轻薄面料自然贴合成熟女性的身材曲线。一件亮钴蓝色的轻便外套滑落至肘部上方，大方地露出双肩和锁骨。双肩放松，上半身向左微转。佩戴精致的垂坠耳环，细金链末端镶嵌着透明小宝石。颈间佩戴一条点缀着单颗小宝石的精巧项链。

背景与光影：
背景为 延伸至地平线的深蓝色大海与晴朗天空。远处的左侧可见模糊的小岛剪影，底部为白色的海边栏杆。正午左右的强烈自然光从左上方照射，在发丝表面、左肩、锁骨和脸颊上形成明亮的高光。面部右侧带有柔和的蓝色反射光，鼻下和下巴处有自然的浅淡阴影。海面上闪烁着细碎的波光，清晰地界定了天空与大海的蓝色。

构图与相机：
2:3 纵向构图，聚焦于胸部的中景特写。人物占据画面约 75%，上方留有少量天空，右侧留出海景空间。相机位于略高于胸部的平视高度。使用 85mm 等效中焦镜头，浅景深精准对焦于眼睛和侧脸，将背景的大海与岛屿平滑虚化。

质感与风格：
高质量夏季时尚摄影。自然的皮肤质感，保留细微纹理和绒毛，无过度磨皮。精准刻画白色布料的细密纹理、蓝色外套的轻微褶皱以及金属配饰的细小反光。以蓝白为主的高饱和度且纯净的色调，清新的对比度，带有细腻的胶片颗粒感。
